status: side project / pilot - not part of Empire Decoded pipeline
description: Kids' mythology series pilot: Zeus & the Cyclopes origin story. Generated on Higgsfield 2026-06-14 (Theodore voice). Flagged for the user to decide whether this becomes its own series/pipeline.

lines.text: What if I told you... the most powerful lightning bolt in the whole sky started out as a THANK-YOU gift? Made by three giant friends. For one little god. Let's find out how!

Long, long ago, on a sunny island called Crete, there lived a baby god named Zeus. His daddy, old King Cronus, was a bit of a grump who didn't like sharing, so kind nymphs and a gentle goat named Amalthea took care of baby Zeus on a quiet mountain.

One day, curious little Zeus wandered into a glowing cave... and found THREE giant friends! Each one had just ONE big eye. Whoa! You have ONE eye! That's so cool! said Zeus. You're... you're not scared of us? asked Brontes. Why would I be? One eye means more room for eyebrows! The Cyclopes burst out laughing.

Brontes, Steropes, and Arges had been hiding for a long time, because some people thought they looked too different. But Zeus didn't care one bit. They played peek-a-boo for HOURS. The Cyclopes were so happy to have a friend who liked them just as they were, they decided to make Zeus the BEST gift ever. They gathered starlight, forge-fire, and a little bit of thunder. For the bravest, kindest little god we know! said Steropes. And out came... a LIGHTNING BOLT!

Zeus zoomed across the sky, his new lightning bolt sparkling behind him, not to scare anyone, but to light up the night and remind everyone: being different makes you AMAZING. Which House do YOU belong to: Zeus, Athena, or Poseidon? Tell us in the comments, and don't forget to subscribe so you don't miss the next Little Olympus adventure!

remaining_work: No music, SFX, images, or video generated yet for this project.
